description: Cross-language consistency fixture for the PreToolUse hook (issue #69). Each case starts with `tool_input`, applies an ordered chain of hook decisions (`hook_decisions`, fired in registration order), and asserts the outcome. A `mutate` decision replaces `tool_input` with its `data`; a chain threads each mutation to the next hook. A `deny` decision short-circuits the chain and rejects the tool call. `expected.outcome` is `continue` or `deny`; on `continue`, `expected.tool_input` is the final (possibly mutated) input.
